# Mascot Maker Studio
> The world's most powerful AI design hub for consistent characters, 8-frame storyboards, and generic design assets.

## Core Engines
- [Character Generator](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/character-generator): Create professional 3D and 2D characters with identity consistency.
- [Story Studio](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/story-studio): Generate seamless 8-frame narratives for storyboards and social content.
- [Mix Studio](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/mix-studio): Composite characters with real-world products for high-end advertisements.
- [Icon Maker](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/icon-generator): Generate minimalist, 3D, or vector logos and icons.

## Popular Solutions
- [SaaS Branding](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/saas): Custom assets optimized for software platforms.
- [Gaming Assets](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/gaming): 3D characters and isometric props for game developers.
- [3D Pixar Style](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/3d-pixar): Cinematic character generation with high-fidelity renders.

## Localized Studios
- [AI Design Hub London](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/near/london)
- [AI Design Hub New York](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/near/new-york)
- [AI Design Hub Austin](https://mascotmaker.io/mascot-maker/near/austin)
